C

Controller - Class in mvc.controller
The controller object in the MVC pattern.
Controller() - Constructor for class mvc.controller.Controller
Default constructor of the Controller class.

D

decrypt(String) - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Accepts a message string, composed of phonograms and decodes it to english alphabet.

E

encrypt(String) - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Accepts a message string and encrypts it according to Model.key.

G

getAllEncodedCharacters() - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Returns the array of valid characters that can be encoded.
getAllPhonograms() - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Returns all encryption characters.
getNonHandledCharacters() - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Returns the pattern, which specifies the illegal characters.
getTotalPhonogramsNum() - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Returns number of all phonograms.

H

HomophonicCipherLab01 - Class in polsl.milosz.homophoniccipherlab01
Wrapper class of the application.
HomophonicCipherLab01() - Constructor for class polsl.milosz.homophoniccipherlab01.HomophonicCipherLab01
Default constructor of the HomophonicCipherLab01 class.

I

init(int, int, int, boolean) - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Initilizes fields related to key generation and generates the key (or uses default one).
isPhonogramsNumSufficient(int, int, int) - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Checks if provided combination of minimal and maximal numbers of phongrams, assigned to a single letter as well as the length of a phonogram are valid.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class polsl.milosz.homophoniccipherlab01.HomophonicCipherLab01
The main() function of the program.
Model - Class in mvc.model
Represents the Model component in the MVC pattern.
Model() - Constructor for class mvc.model.Model
Constructs the Model instances and initilizes internal parameters: Model.allEncodedCharacters, Model.allPhonograms, Model.key, Model.frequencyTable, Model.nonHandledCharacters.
mvc.controller - package mvc.controller
This pacakage contains the implementation of the Controller class from the MVC pattern Controller.
mvc.model - package mvc.model
Package contains two classes Model and UnknownPhonogramException.
mvc.view - package mvc.view
Package contains implementation of the View class from the MVC pattern View.

P

polsl.milosz.homophoniccipherlab01 - package polsl.milosz.homophoniccipherlab01
Contains the class HomophonicCipherLab01 which acts as the wrapper for the application.
promptForInput() - Method in class mvc.view.View
Prompts user for text input until non-blank text is given.
promptForInteger() - Method in class mvc.view.View
Prompts user for valid integer input until it's provided.

R

requestKey() - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Returns the main homophony encoding table.
runApp(String) - Method in class mvc.controller.Controller
Main function, responsible for running the whole application.

S

showKey(Map<String, String[]>) - Method in class mvc.view.View
Prints the homophoninc key table.
showMessage(String) - Method in class mvc.view.View
Prints a given string message followed by a new line character to standard output.
showOptions() - Method in class mvc.view.View
Displays options availabale to the user in the main menu.
suggestedNumberOfPhonograms(int, int) - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Calculates the nuber of phongrams that will be needed to encode the whole alphabet.

T

testEncryptedString(String) - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Validates encrypted string, if it contains legal phonogram characters (phonogram must belong to Model.allPhonograms.

U

UnknownPhonogramException - Exception Class in mvc.model
Thrown when an unknown encryption character (phongram)is encoutered during decding process.
UnknownPhonogramException() - Constructor for exception class mvc.model.UnknownPhonogramException
Constructs a new exception with null as its internal message.
UnknownPhonogramException(String) - Constructor for exception class mvc.model.UnknownPhonogramException
Constructs the new exception with specified detailed message.

V

View - Class in mvc.view
Takes user input and handles displaying text in console.
View() - Constructor for class mvc.view.View
Constructs the View and initilizes the internal View.scanner to read from standard input.
